label: Reply chain with lots of quoted text

data.subject: Re: Re: Re: Budget approval for Q2 marketing campaign
data.textBody:
Approved on my end. Please process the PO by Wednesday April 8th.

— Frank

> On Apr 5, 2026, Sarah wrote:
> Hi Frank,
> 
> Just following up on the budget approval. We need to lock in the
> conference sponsorship before the early bird deadline.
> 
> The total cost is $12,500 broken down as:
> - Booth space: $8,000
> - Marketing materials: $2,500
> - Travel (2 people): $2,000
> 
> Can you approve this by end of week?
> 
> Thanks,
> Sarah
>
>> On Apr 3, 2026, Frank wrote:
>> What's the breakdown? I need to see itemized costs before
>> I can approve anything over $10K.
>>
>>> On Apr 2, 2026, Sarah wrote:
>>> Hi Frank,
>>>
>>> We need budget approval for the Q2 marketing campaign.
>>> The DevConf 2026 sponsorship is available and it's a great
>>> opportunity to showcase our product.
>>>
>>> Let me know if you need more details.
>>>
>>> Sarah
